default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore collaboration opportunities between Sw yx's AI engineering community and Marcel Santilli's connections, particularly Surge AI.](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge AI, a highly profitable ($1B+ revenue) data labeling company, seeks to raise its profile in the AI community](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [Potential speaking opportunities for Surge AI at upcoming AI Engineer events (New York Summit, World's Fair)](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [GrowthX, Marcel's company, offers services to AI companies and may be interested in event sponsorships](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)

## Topics

### Surge AI Overview

  - [$1B+ in revenue, 150 employees, never raised funding](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Focuses on high-quality data annotation and post-training research](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Pays data annotators well, uses advanced matching algorithms for skill assessment](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Works with major tech companies (Apple, Google, Microsoft, Anthropic)](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Identifies failure modes in AI models and creates targeted data campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### AI Engineer Events

  - [New York Summit (November 20-21, 2023): Focused on coding agents](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [World's Fair (June 30 - July 2, 2024): Larger event (5,000 attendees) with multiple tracks](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Potential Q1 2024 event focused on RL and human data (not yet announced)](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Track sponsorship opportunities available for World's Fair](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)

### Collaboration Ideas

  - [Surge AI speaking at New York Summit on cloud code insights](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [Potential track sponsorship for human data/RLHF at World's Fair](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Surge AI appearing on Sw yx's podcast (Latent Space) later in the year](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Exploring Surge AI's expert network for ARK Foundation's simulation scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### GrowthX Background

  - [Marcel's company, recently raised Series A, crossing $11M in revenue](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [70% gross margin despite being service-based](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Clients include various AI companies (CodeRabbit, Augment, Galileo AI, Metronome)](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to review sponsorship prospectus for New York Summit (to be sent by Sw yx)](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [Discuss potential Surge AI speaking opportunity at New York Summit with Edwin](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Explore World's Fair track sponsorship for human data/RLHF](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Consider Surge AI appearance on Latent Space podcast later in the year](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Marcel to follow up on potential collaborations and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/sDffREDLrsxyexMg9tqSBFkxLxE3LasJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)

action_items.description: Discuss w/ Surge AI - speaking at NY (Nov 20-21) & SF (early next yr) AI Engineer Summits; potential World's Fair track sponsorship (Jun 30-Jul 2)
Email Marcel sponsorship perspectives for NY AI Engineer Summit
Ask Surge AI about scheduling podcast appearance w/ Sw yx later this year
